title: A-Side of YTPMV
description:
EDIT 7/4/2016: Okay, today is the actual 5th Anniversary of Medley of YTPMV. It was on this day 5 years ago that I released the remake of Medley of YTPMV, marking the first entry of the original (and currently only) YTPMV Medley series.

***

A.k.a. Almost 5th Anniversary Remix of Medley of YTPMV

I was never truly happy about how my initial remake of the first medley sounded like, but due to my lack of skills I just had to roll with it for the time being. But now, after finally reaching a satisfying sound quality with D-Side of YTPMV, I decided to remake my remake with those instruments. Here's what I would truly like to call the A-Side of YTPMV.  :)

#ytpmvmedley

***

Project file, MP3 and split tracks:
